rationale: Educ. Code §11.164 governs paperwork limits for classroom teachers. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of each school district shall limit redundant requests for information and the number and length of written reports that a classroom teacher is required to prepare.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict detected.
